body_txt: Some orphans have it easy , but not these ones. This trope is about fiction highlighting the unpleasant side of losing one's parents to death or abandonment . The parents have been lost recently, and the main plot (or at least a major subplot) involves dealing with this loss. This generally includes some combination of: The character is often a Heartwarming Orphan . If they're especially unlucky, they will be Raised by Orcs . Contrast with Conveniently an Orphan , where orphanhood is used simply as a plot-enabler. Also see Happily Adopted .
